# Nitrogen Adsorption Desorption

**Summary**: Nitrogen adsorption and desorption are used to characterize the surface area and pore size distribution of barite particles.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-geri|GERI, 2016]] applied nitrogen adsorption/desorption to evaluate the impact of DTPA on the porosity of barite.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Treatment with DTPA-K5 increased the average pore area from 0.3770 m2/g to 0.6712 m2/g. ([[2016-geri|GERI, 2016, p. 151]])
